note: Every domain of human knowledge is S examining a specific O through R | VB. The domain IS the choice of O.

principles.name: PERSISTENCIA
principles.shadow: Assuming everything changes OR assuming nothing does
principles.SOR: S fails to identify what persists in O -> R has no anchor

principles.name: ENTROPIA
principles.SOR: S assumes R holds without energy input -> R decays invisibly

principles.name: SELECCION
principles.shadow: Controlling variation (rigidity) or skipping selection (wanting guarantees)
principles.SOR: S forces R onto O instead of letting territory select

principles.name: FEEDBACK
principles.shadow: Ignoring signals (denial) or drowning in them (no filter)
principles.SOR: S blocks feedback from O -> map and territory diverge

principles.name: EMERGENCIA
principles.shadow: Explaining the emergent by reducing to components (losing structure)
principles.SOR: S models O at wrong level -> R misses the operative layer

principles.name: RESTRICCION DA FORMA
principles.shadow: Ignoring constraints (fantasy) or accepting false constraints (learned helplessness)
principles.SOR: S misidentifies real constraints on O -> R optimizes within wrong limits

principles.name: SIMETRIA REVELA ESTRUCTURA
principles.description: What is invariant under transformation is more fundamental
principles.shadow: Confusing surface similarity with deep structure (false analogy)
principles.SOR: S maps O by surface features -> R = false correspondence

principles.name: INFORMACION TIENE COSTO
principles.description: Knowing changes capacity to act, measuring is not free
principles.shadow: Acting without information (recklessness) or seeking it indefinitely (paralysis)
principles.SOR: S ignores O's real state or tries to know it completely before acting

principles.name: AUTO-REFERENCIA TIENE LIMITES
principles.description: Systems modeling themselves hit irreducible boundaries
principles.shadow: Believing you can fully audit yourself from inside
principles.SOR: S tries to be both S and O simultaneously -> R = circular (L1)

principles.name: TRANSICIONES DE UMBRAL
principles.shadow: Projecting linearity (can't see the cliff until falling)
principles.SOR: S projects linear R onto O that has nonlinear thresholds
